suites.title: Spatial NYC
suites.label: Architecture you can enter
suites.headline: A New York building becomes the interface.
suites.description: Walk a procedural brownstone, inspect its facade, then shift into a cinematic city-scale build.

suites.title: Motion Playground
suites.label: Movement with a communication job
suites.headline: Control the rhythm, then inspect the craft.
suites.description: Scrub a scroll story, replay service interactions, and tune a laser-drawn campaign poster.

suites.title: Systems Lab
suites.label: From a messy signal to an owned tool
suites.headline: See the business change as its systems connect.
suites.description: Shape a service concept, compare operating states, and inspect the complete earlier site.

suites.title: Campaign Studio
suites.label: One idea, multiple visual systems
suites.headline: Switch the voice without losing the point.
suites.description: Compare a kinetic hero, a high-contrast campaign, and a complete hospitality client world.

concepts.title: Brownstone Walk-Up
concepts.description: Climb a New York walk-up from street level to the water tower.

concepts.title: Cinematic 3D
concepts.description: Architecture, atmosphere, and scroll-driven story inside a working site.

concepts.title: Scroll Into Motion
concepts.description: A single object changes meaning as the page moves through it.

concepts.title: Micro-Animations
concepts.description: Service ideas translated into small, readable moments of motion.

concepts.title: AHA Laser Poster
concepts.description: A laser-cut poster becomes a responsive typographic performance.

concepts.title: Studio Engine
concepts.description: A local concept generator with real controls, layouts, and export paths.

concepts.title: Growth Street
concepts.description: A row of storefronts changes as the systems behind them improve.

concepts.title: Tech Support Site
concepts.description: The earlier full service site, preserved as a complete working branch.

concepts.title: Goliath
concepts.description: Little Fight at its loudest with sharp type, hard contrast, and direct action.

concepts.title: Hero Prototype

concepts.description: Chef Drew's catering world with appetite, motion, and booking paths.
